content.en:
"Ye Tian actually condensed the Pagoda of Will!!"

When the Lord of Canggu got the news, he immediately went to Ye Tian to confirm it, and after learning that it was true, he showed a look of disbelief.

Although after entering the Void Will Realm, there is hope for condensing the Will Pagoda, but the probability of failure is too high.

In fact, many of the Three Realms Perfect Masters have entered the Void Will Realm, but many of them have failed, and there are very few examples of success, if they can all succeed, then they have to be.

And Ye Tian is a super-level perfect controller, and the probability of condensing the Will Pagoda is already many times lower than that of the Three Realms perfect controller.

In the past, they also allowed many super-perfect masters to enter the Void Will Realm, but they all failed, so they did not allow the super-perfect masters to enter the Void Will Realm later, so as not to waste their places.

Prior to this, there was only one super-perfect master who had condensed the Will Pagoda, and now there was more Ye Tian.

"Great, Ye Tian was originally a perfect controller with his own extreme path breakthrough, and now that he has condensed the Will Pagoda, he will definitely become a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm in the future, and even among the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, it is an extremely terrifying existence!" thought to the Lord of the Ancients.

The Lord of the Daoless also quickly learned about it, and they were all very happy.

After all, Ye Tian is a member of the Wudao Tower, and when Ye Tian is strong, the strength of the Wudao Tower will naturally increase!

Extreme True River.

The Lord of the White Night was also surprised when he learned about Ye Tian's Condensation of Will Pagoda.

"It deserves to be the first place on the Extreme Dao Genius Battle Killing List!"

The Lord of the White Night.

Of course, although Ye Tian had high potential and was invincible at the same level, he was still not qualified to enter their circle, so he just paid attention to it, and he didn't pay attention to it.

After all, at his level, there are a lot of things to do, where do you have the heart to pay attention to a Ye Tian!

There are many demonic geniuses, but the ones who really grow up are the real geniuses.

If Ye Tian does not step into the realm of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, he is not qualified to become the top existence in the Extreme Realm, nor is he qualified to enter the circle of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller.

......

No Road Tower.

After Ye Tian met with the Lord of the Daoless and the Lord of the Ancient Realm, they chatted for a while, and then said that he wanted to attack the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

"The Lord of the Daoless, the Lord of the Ancients, the Lord of the Eternal Night, the Lord of the Sword Extreme, I have now cultivated to the limit, and I can't continue to improve, so I'm ready to attack the perfect controller of the Void Realm!"

Ye Tian said.

The Lord of the Pathless Dao asked, "Lord of Endless, how many of your Extreme Dao chains have broken?"

"Thirty-six!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, you actually broke all the chains of the Extreme Dao?"

The Lord of the Pathless was astonished.

He had only broken thirteen Extreme Dao chains at the beginning, and it had taken him endless years, compared to Ye Tian, he was simply too ordinary!

However, when he thought that Ye Tian had killed so many Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Mang Realm, how many resources he had collected, it was estimated that there were a lot of treasures like the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit.

Therefore, it was normal for Ye Tian to break the thirty-six Extreme Dao chains.

At this time, the Lord of the Daoless Dao asked, "Lord of Endless, how many Extreme Dao Golden Fruits or similar treasures do you have?"

"Also, I can take some out, but not too much!"

Ye Tian said.

Although he still has a lot left, there is no need to take them all out, after all, this kind of resources, maybe one day there will be other uses, just like the human race has also given birth to countless eternal controllers under his cultivation, and even some half-step perfect controllers have been born, maybe one day a super perfect controller will be cultivated, and the Extreme Golden Fruit is also needed.

Therefore, it is natural to keep some of these things.

As for those super-perfect controllers of the Pathless Tower, they can have enough Extreme Dao Golden Fruits to break the Extreme Dao chains, but they won't really take out a large number of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits to help them break more Extreme Dao chains.

"Lord of Endless, the resources you come up with, they also have to take out treasures of similar value to exchange. The Lord of the Pathless said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Anyway, contributing to the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit for free, that is a non-existent thing.

Soon.

When the news was announced, the super-perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower were overjoyed, including the Lord of Time.

"The Daoless Tower can actually be exchanged for the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit!!"

The Lord of Time was very excited, his Extreme Dao had already reached the Xiaocheng realm, and his cultivation had also reached the peak realm of a super-perfect controller, and he was just about to break the chains of the Extreme Dao.

However, the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit was so rare that there was no place to sell it, so he still hadn't broken even a single Extreme Chain.

If he could break an extreme chain, he would be sure to reach the realm of the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

Soon, he learned where the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit came from, and it was provided by Ye Tian.

"It seems that Ye Tian has found a lot of Extreme Dao Golden Fruits in the Extreme Mang Realm, and there are still leftovers to take out!"

The Lord of Time marvels.

He even had a guess, that is, Ye Tian had broken the thirty-six Extreme Dao chains, otherwise it would be impossible to take out the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit and use it for other super-perfect controllers.

When he thought that Ye Tian had broken the thirty-six extreme chains, he sighed with emotion!

It was difficult for him to break even an Extreme Dao Chain, but Ye Tian had broken so many Extreme Dao Chains, this gap was too big!

"It's a pity that I didn't survive in the Extreme Mang Realm, otherwise there would be hope to find the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit!" said the Lord of Time darkly.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Time spent most of his net worth, and finally exchanged a few Extreme Golden Fruits, which was able to break an Extreme Dao chain.

And the other super-perfect controllers also exchanged for the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit, and then went to impact the Extreme Dao Chain.

Seeing this scene, the Lord of the Daoless and the Lord of the Ancient was very happy.

With so many Extreme Dao Golden Fruits, it won't be too long before the Daoless Tower can give birth to a few more Realm Perfect Controllers.

Moreover, the Wudao Tower also has a Golden Extreme Dao Monument, so it will be very easy to give birth to a super-perfect controller in the future.

Now, many of the perfect masters of the Daoless Pagoda have begun to turn to cultivating the Extreme Dao of Enlightenment and Enlightenment, giving up other Extreme Dao.

......

this day.

Ye Tian began to attack the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm, and no one else in the Dao Tower was allowed to disturb Ye Tian.

From a super-perfect master to a perfect controller of the virtual realm, it is necessary to evolve the Perfect Extreme Dao Ancestor into the Extreme Dao Void Body, so that the body can be transformed, the strength transformed, and even the Extreme Dao will be transformed and improved.

Now, Ye Tian's potential is unprecedentedly high, and his foundation has reached an unimaginable level, so he can break through at any time, and the success rate is one hundred percent.

"Break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In an instant, the shackles in the dark were easily shattered by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation began to transform and break through, stepping into the realm of the perfect controller of the virtual realm.
